title: Cozy Flaky Butter Crumble
description: A fresh, flaky, cozy Egyptian dish featuring salted butter and bhuna spices in a paleo-friendly version.
instructions: Gather all ingredients and mix the salted butter with bhuna masala blend in a mixing bowl until well combined.
Drop tablespoon-sized pieces of the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, pressing slightly to flatten them.
Bake for about 12-15 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
